# Kish Energy

Kish Energy (kishenergy.ir) is a premium energy sector company registered in the Kish Island Free Trade Zone, Iran, with a representative operations office in Tehran. The company serves global energy markets across three core divisions: Energy Trading & Brokerage, Engineering, Procurement, and Construction (EPC) projects, and Industrial Equipment Supply.

## Key Information
- **Domain:** kishenergy.ir
- **Headquarters:** Unit 305, Energy Tower, Sanaei Blvd, Kish Island, Iran (+98 76 4442 0000)
- **Operations Office:** No. 12, Nelson Mandela Blvd, Tehran, Iran (+98 21 8888 0000)
- **Email:** info@kishenergy.ir
- **Primary Focus:** Bridging Regional Energy Production with International Partnerships

## Divisions and Core Offerings

### 1. Energy Trading & Brokerage
- Crude Oil and Gas Condensates (heavy, light, extra light grades).
- LPG (Liquefied Petroleum Gas), LNG (Liquefied Natural Gas), and Natural Gas.
- Refined Petroleum Products (diesel, fuel oil, gasoline, jet fuel).
- Petrochemical Sourcing (polymers, fertilizers, aromatics, solvents).
- Logistical facilitation, customs clearance, shipping chartering.

### 2. Engineering, Procurement, and Construction (EPC)
- Turnkey downstream refining units modernizations.
- Oil & gas pipeline network engineering, piping layouts, and compressor/pumping stations.
- Industrial storage tank farms and loading terminals.
- Power plant facilities (thermal, gas turbine, and renewable arrays).

### 3. Industrial Equipment Supply
- API 610 centrifugal process pumps and compressors.
- Control valves, ESD (Emergency Shutdown) valves, and regulators.
- High-voltage power transmission transformers, switchgears, and cabling.
- Severe-service instrumentation, flow meters, and chemical analyzers.

- [FAQ](https://kishenergy.ir/faq) - Structural query answers.
